stem: Q = A AND B is a Boolean expression with two inputs A and B.
model_answer: AND is true only when both inputs are true. Truth table: A=0 B=0 => Q=0; A=0 B=1 => Q=0; A=1 B=0 => Q=0; A=1 B=1 => Q=1.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Complete the truth table for Q = A AND B.

mark_points.text: Q is 1 (true) only when A = 1 AND B = 1
accepted_alternatives: output is only true when both inputs true

mark_points.text: Q is 0 (false) in the other three rows
